query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "heterogeneous scientific foundation model collaboration" other
rationale: This paper is the foundational work (category d) that introduces the "Heterogeneous Scientific Foundation Model Collaboration" framework (Eywa) explicitly referenced in the user's question as the subject of a follow-up study. It establishes the canonical methodology and empirical baseline for the specific mechanism of integrating language models with domain-specific scientific foundation models, which is the core topic the user intends to extend.
